source.definition: quick-witted, intelligent, or skillful in thinking and acting

explanation.sourceText: The English word "clever" originates from Old English "clæfre" meaning skillful or ingenious, evolving to describe someone smart or quick in thought.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „clever” provine din engleza veche „clæfre”, care însemna abil sau ingenios, evoluând pentru a descrie pe cineva deștept sau rapid la gândire.

source.additional: "Clever" is commonly used to describe someone who is smart or resourceful.

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word "sipruit" comes from the Hungarian "síp" (whistle) and was adopted into Romanian to express cleverness.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „sipruit” provine din maghiara „síp” (fluierat) și a fost preluat pentru a descrie istețimea.

target.additional: In Romanian, "sipruit" describes someone who thinks quickly and is witty.

explanation.sourceText: Describes someone who thinks quickly and smartly.
explanation.targetText: Se referă la cineva care gândește rapid și isteț.

examples.sourceText: The clever boy found the solution.

explanation.sourceText: Can also describe a smart, sometimes manipulative manner.
explanation.targetText: Poate descrie și o manieră șireată, uneori manipulativă.

examples.sourceText: He is clever in his business dealings.
The clever boy solved the puzzle quickly.
examples.targetText: Băiatul sipruit a rezolvat rapid enigma.

examples.sourceText: She always gives clever answers to questions.
examples.targetText: Ea dă mereu răspunsuri sipruite la întrebări.

examples.sourceText: It is clever to apply such strategies.
examples.targetText: Este sipruit să aplici astfel de strategii.

examples.sourceText: The clever ideas of the designers are a hit.
examples.targetText: Ideile sipruite ale designerilor sunt un succes.

examples.sourceText: He always has a clever solution ready.
examples.targetText: El are mereu o soluție sipruită la dispoziție.

examples.sourceText: She is very clever in dealing with difficult people.
examples.targetText: Ea este foarte sipruită în interacțiunea cu oamenii dificili.

learningTips.text: Remember "sipruit" sounds like "sip" which can remind you of a quick whistle signaling a smart idea.
Think of a clever fox that 'sips' a plan quietly before acting—this helps link "sipruit" with cleverness.
Associate "sipruit" with the English word "clever"—both describe someone smart and quick-witted.
Imagine a whistle (síp) calling attention to a clever thought, making "sipruit" easy to remember.
